# `aa` - database schema slice

Source of truth: [`backend/prisma/schema.prisma`](../../../prisma/schema.prisma).
This file mirrors the Prisma models owned by this feature so the schema is
co-located with the code that reads/writes it. Regenerate via:

```bash
pwsh backend/scripts/scaffold-feature-schemas.ps1
```

## `AaConsent`

```prisma
model AaConsent {
  id            String    @id @default(uuid())
  userId        String
  consentHandle String?
  consentId     String?   @unique
  vua           String? // Virtual User Address
  status        String    @default("CREATED") // CREATED | PENDING | READY | ACTIVE | REVOKED | EXPIRED | REJECTED
  purpose       String? // JSON: { code, text }
  fiTypes       String? // JSON array: ["DEPOSIT", "MUTUAL_FUNDS"]
  consentTypes  String? // JSON array: ["TRANSACTIONS", "SUMMARY"]
  dataFrom      DateTime?
  dataTo        DateTime?
  createdAt     DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt     DateTime  @updatedAt

  @@index([userId])
  @@index([consentHandle])
  @@index([status])
  @@map("aa_consent")
  @@schema("public")
}
```

## `AaConsentArtifact`

```prisma
model AaConsentArtifact {
  id           String   @id @default(uuid())
  consentId    String   @unique
  artifactJson String? // Full consent object JSON
  signature    String? // Base64 signed consent
  status       String?
  createdAt    DateTime @default(now())

  @@map("aa_consent_artifact")
  @@schema("public")
}
```

## `AaDataSession`

```prisma
model AaDataSession {
  id            String   @id @default(uuid())
  consentId     String
  sessionId     String   @unique
  sessionStatus String   @default("ACTIVE") // ACTIVE | COMPLETED | EXPIRED | FAILED
  userId        String
  createdAt     DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt     DateTime @updatedAt

  @@index([consentId])
  @@index([userId])
  @@map("aa_data_session")
  @@schema("public")
}
```

## `AaFinancialData`

```prisma
model AaFinancialData {
  id                  String   @id @default(uuid())
  userId              String
  consentId           String
  sessionId           String
  accountType         String? // DEPOSIT, MUTUAL_FUNDS, etc.
  maskedAccountNumber String?
  dataJson            String? // Raw FI data JSON
  createdAt           DateTime @default(now())

  @@index([userId])
  @@index([consentId])
  @@map("aa_financial_data")
  @@schema("public")
}
```

## `AaTransaction`

```prisma
model AaTransaction {
  id                  String   @id @default(uuid())
  userId              String
  consentId           String
  transactionDate     DateTime
  amount              Decimal  @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  type                String // debit | credit
  description         String?
  maskedAccountNumber String?
  createdAt           DateTime @default(now())

  @@index([userId])
  @@index([consentId])
  @@index([transactionDate])
  @@map("aa_transactions")
  @@schema("public")
}
```
